common.name: Name
common.emptyBody: There are no records for the current filters.
common.errorBody: The console could not load this data.
common.safeErrorBody: The action did not finish. Check permissions, connectivity and backend logs.
common.unsupportedAction: This action is not available in the current backend capability set.

auth.loginSubtitle: Use the control-plane account issued by an administrator.
auth.inviteSubtitle: Set the operator password from a one-time invitation.
auth.apiSettingsHint: Leave empty to use the same origin as the browser page.

dashboard.title: Operational overview
dashboard.subtitle: Control-plane readiness, fleet health, service state and active work.

nodes.title: Managed nodes
nodes.subtitle: Agent status, node role, heartbeat, runtime capability and trust lifecycle.
nodes.profileSafeFieldsNote: This form updates only safe node profile metadata. Runtime state, trust, bootstrap, retirement and secret-backed access are managed by dedicated workflows.
nodes.mapSubtitle: Node placement, GeoIP readiness and backhaul topology.
nodes.searchPlaceholder: Node name, address, role, status or ID

onboarding.bootstrapPermissionHint: node.bootstrap is required for onboarding actions. Status remains visible with read permissions.
onboarding.liveValidationNotProven: Live external-node validation is not proven.
onboarding.issueEnrollmentTokenHint: Create a new enrollment credential for this node. The token must still be delivered securely to the node or used by a later bootstrap step.
onboarding.reissueEnrollmentTokenHint: Rotate the enrollment credential because diagnostics indicate operator recovery is required. The remote node or bootstrap material must be updated manually.
onboarding.tokenShownOnlyOnce: The plaintext token is shown only in the immediate response.
onboarding.tokenCannotBeRetrievedAgain: The token value cannot be retrieved again after this panel is closed.
onboarding.issueAcknowledge: I understand that this enrollment token is sensitive and will be shown only once.
onboarding.reissueAcknowledge: I understand that the previous enrollment credential may stop working and that I must securely deliver the new token to the node.
onboarding.existingCredentialMayBeReplaced: Existing active enrollment credentials may be revoked or replaced according to backend behavior.
onboarding.remoteNodeMustBeUpdatedManually: Reissue does not automatically update a remote machine, bootstrap file or running agent.
onboarding.reissueDoesNotProveRecovery: Reissue does not prove recovery until registration and heartbeat are observed.
onboarding.waitingForAgentRegistration: Waiting for agent registration. Do not issue a duplicate token unless diagnostics require operator recovery.
onboarding.tokenValueMissing: The backend accepted the request but did not return a token value. Refresh status and retry only after checking backend logs.
onboarding.tokenIssueDoesNotProveConnectivity: Issuing a token does not prove agent connectivity, registration or heartbeat.
onboarding.guidedBootstrapRemainsNext: Guided bootstrap and inventory actions remain a later onboarding step.

tokenTTLErrors.required: Enter a token TTL in hours.
tokenTTLErrors.integer: Token TTL must be an integer number of hours.
tokenTTLErrors.range: Token TTL must be between {{min}} and {{max}} hours.

tokenIssueErrors.generic: Enrollment token action did not finish. No token was shown.
tokenIssueErrors.invalidTTL: Invalid token TTL or request. Correct the value and retry.
tokenIssueErrors.nodeMissing: Node no longer exists. Refresh the node list.
tokenIssueErrors.conflict: Enrollment token action conflicted with current node or credential state.
tokenIssueErrors.rateLimited: Enrollment token action was rate limited. Wait before retrying manually.
tokenIssueErrors.server: Enrollment token service returned an operational error. No token was shown.
tokenIssueErrors.unavailable: Enrollment token service is unavailable. No token was shown.

onboarding.manualExecutionRequired: Manual execution is required; bundle generation does not run anything on the node.
onboarding.serverFirewallValidationWillRun: Server-side firewall policy validation will still run before SSH bootstrap is accepted.
onboarding.sshBootstrapConfirmServerConnect: The server will connect to the configured SSH target.
onboarding.sshBootstrapConfirmCredentialUse: The pinned host fingerprint and configured SSH credential will be used.
onboarding.sshBootstrapAcknowledge: I understand that SSH bootstrap uses the configured target and that job acceptance does not prove installation success.
onboarding.manualBundleAcknowledge: I understand that this job generates sensitive bootstrap material and that reveal/download is a separate audited action.
onboarding.manualBundleOpenBootstrapHint: Open Bootstrap to reveal or download the generated bundle through the audited bundle controls.
onboarding.manualBundleGeneratesSensitiveMaterial: The job generates sensitive bootstrap material.
onboarding.bundleGenerationDoesNotExecute: Bundle generation does not execute the bundle on the node.
onboarding.manualBundleSeparateAuditedReveal: Reveal and download remain separate audited actions in the Bootstrap tab.
onboarding.bootstrapAcceptanceDoesNotProveInstallat: Job acceptance does not prove installation success.
onboarding.bootstrapAcceptanceDoesNotProveOnboardin: Job acceptance does not prove agent registration, heartbeat or onboarding completion.
onboarding.concurrentBootstrapActive: A bootstrap run is already queued or running; duplicate guided submission is disabled.
onboarding.bootstrapFailureRetryHint: The latest bootstrap run failed or was cancelled. Retry only after reviewing safe job/bootstrap evidence.
onboarding.guidedInventoryRemainsNext: Guided registration, heartbeat and inventory synchronization remain the next onboarding stage.
onboarding.guidedInventoryRequiresRegistrationHeart: Inventory synchronization becomes available only after real registration and online heartbeat evidence.
onboarding.heartbeatMustBeOnline: Heartbeat must be online before inventory synchronization.
onboarding.inventorySyncAcknowledge: I understand that this queues an asynchronous inventory job and that job acceptance does not prove inventory synchronization.
onboarding.inventoryResultStalled: Inventory result stalled. Review diagnostics before retrying.
onboarding.inventoryPermissionHint: node.write is required for inventory synchronization. Status remains visible with read permissions.
onboarding.inventoryAsyncJob: Inventory synchronization queues an asynchronous agent job.
onboarding.inventoryAcceptanceDoesNotProveSync: Job acceptance does not prove inventory synchronization.
onboarding.liveValidationStillRequired: Live external-node validation is still required before production cutover.

inventoryErrors.notFound: Node no longer exists. Refresh node state.
inventoryErrors.conflict: Inventory synchronization conflicts with current node or job state.
inventoryErrors.rateLimited: Inventory synchronization was rate limited. Wait before retrying manually.
inventoryErrors.server: Inventory synchronization returned an operational error.

bootstrapReasons.local_managed: Remote bootstrap is not offered for local-managed nodes.
bootstrapReasons.bootstrap_already_active: Another bootstrap run is already active.
bootstrapReasons.bootstrap_state_unknown: Latest bootstrap state is unknown. Refresh state or inspect Jobs before retrying.
bootstrapReasons.ssh_access_missing: No SSH access method is configured.
bootstrapReasons.ssh_access_disabled: The SSH access method is disabled.
bootstrapReasons.ssh_host_key_missing: Pinned SSH host fingerprint is missing.

bootstrapWarnings.server_firewall_validation: Server firewall validation may still reject the request.
bootstrapWarnings.manual_execution_required: The operator must deliver and execute the generated bundle manually.
bootstrapWarnings.bundle_generation_not_execution: Generating a bundle does not prove installation or agent registration.

bootstrapErrors.notFound: Node or required bootstrap resource was not found. Refresh node state.
bootstrapErrors.conflict: Bootstrap conflicts with current node lifecycle or an active bootstrap run.
bootstrapErrors.sshPrerequisite: SSH bootstrap prerequisites are incomplete or rejected by the backend.
bootstrapErrors.firewall: Firewall policy blocks SSH bootstrap. Review firewall policy before retrying.
bootstrapErrors.rateLimited: Bootstrap action was rate limited. Wait before retrying manually.
bootstrapErrors.server: Bootstrap service returned an operational error.

evidence.profile_retired: The node is retired or deleted; onboarding cannot continue.
evidence.profile_loaded: The control-plane node record is loaded.
evidence.profile_maintenance: The node profile is loaded and currently in maintenance mode.
evidence.credential_node_blocked: Credential work is blocked because the node is retired.
evidence.credential_revoked: Agent credential rotation status is revoked.
evidence.credential_registered: The agent is already registered, so an enrollment credential is no longer the active milestone.
evidence.bootstrap_node_blocked: Bootstrap is blocked because the node is retired.
evidence.bootstrap_registered_path: A registered agent proves that a supported onboarding path completed.
evidence.bootstrap_successful: A successful bootstrap run is recorded.
evidence.bootstrap_cancelled: The latest bootstrap run was cancelled.
evidence.bootstrap_unknown_status: The latest bootstrap status is not terminal and is treated conservatively.
evidence.registration_node_blocked: Registration is blocked because the node is retired.
evidence.registration_auth_failure: Authentication failure prevents trusting registration health.
evidence.registration_pending: Agent registration is pending earlier onboarding milestones.
evidence.heartbeat_node_blocked: Heartbeat is blocked because the node is retired.
evidence.inventory_node_blocked: Inventory is blocked because the node is retired.
evidence.inventory_job_failed: The latest safe inventory job evidence is failed.
evidence.inventory_job_unknown: The latest inventory job result is unknown and is treated conservatively.

nodes.forceReenrollLabel: Issue a fresh enrollment during bootstrap.
nodes.bootstrapImpact: Bootstrap and reinstall jobs are executed by the backend and require valid access methods, host-key pinning and firewall access.
nodes.sshAccessMissing: No enabled SSH access method is available for this node.
nodes.manualBundlePermissionHint: Permission required: node.bootstrap to reveal or download manual bootstrap bundles.
nodes.manualBundleDownloadStarted: Manual bootstrap bundle download was started.
nodes.manualBundlePanelWarning: This content contains one-time onboarding material. Keep it only for the current operator action and close this panel when finished.
nodes.manualBundleCopied: Manual bootstrap bundle copied to clipboard.
nodes.manualBundleCopyFailed: Clipboard copy failed. Use the visible field only if your browser blocks clipboard access.
nodes.manualBundleConfirmIntro: Confirm this sensitive manual bootstrap bundle action before contacting the backend.
nodes.manualBundleContainsSensitive: The bundle may contain credentials or bootstrap material for this node.
nodes.manualBundleActionAudited: The backend audits reveal and download attempts.
nodes.manualBundleRepeatedAudited: Repeated reveal or download attempts may be visible in audit trails.
nodes.manualBundleLiveOnboardingNotVerified: Live operator onboarding is still a release-validation item.
nodes.manualBundleAcknowledge: I understand this is sensitive one-time bootstrap material and will handle it outside persistent browser storage.

manualBundleErrors.badRequest: Manual bootstrap bundle request was rejected.
manualBundleErrors.forbidden: Permission denied for manual bootstrap bundle access.
manualBundleErrors.notAvailable: Manual bootstrap bundle is no longer available. The bootstrap runs list was refreshed.
manualBundleErrors.unresolved: Manual bootstrap bundle is not resolved yet. Retry after the bootstrap run finishes.
manualBundleErrors.tooLarge: Manual bootstrap bundle is too large for this action.
manualBundleErrors.auditFailed: Manual bootstrap bundle action was blocked because audit logging failed.
manualBundleErrors.server: Manual bootstrap bundle action failed on the backend.
manualBundleErrors.secretStorageUnavailable: Secret storage is unavailable for manual bootstrap bundle access.

nodes.sshAccessCreateIntro: Create an SSH access method only after verifying the host fingerprint through a trusted channel.
nodes.hostKeyChangedWarning: Scanned host key differs from the currently pinned fingerprint. Verify this out-of-band before pinning.
nodes.fingerprintIndependentVerification: I verified this fingerprint through an independent trusted channel.
nodes.sshPrivateKeyWarning: The private key is transmitted once to encrypted backend storage and is not displayed again. Passphrase-protected keys are not supported; use a dedicated unencrypted key for this node.
nodes.sshAccessTargetInvalid: SSH host, port and user are required, and port must be between 1 and 65535.
nodes.sshAccessNoFingerprints: The scan returned no host fingerprints. Creation is blocked until a fingerprint is available.
nodes.sshAccessFingerprintRequired: Select a fingerprint and confirm independent verification before entering a private key.
nodes.terminalSecurityNote: The browser only requests a short-lived backend terminal ticket; SSH credentials stay server-side.
nodes.terminalUnavailable: SSH terminal requires an enabled SSH access method with secret reference and pinned host-key fingerprint.
nodes.retireImpact: Normal retire is blocked by backend validation when active dependent state remains.
nodes.forceRetireImpact: Force retire cleans control-plane state for a lost node. Type {{node}} exactly before requesting it.

lifecycleControls.overallHealthy: Lifecycle evidence is healthy for read-only monitoring.
lifecycleControls.overallWarning: Lifecycle evidence needs operator attention before remediation.
lifecycleControls.overallBlocked: Lifecycle evidence is blocked or ambiguous; destructive remediation remains disabled here.
lifecycleControls.deferredActionsTitle: Remaining destructive lifecycle controls are not exposed in this step.
lifecycleControls.deferredActionsBody: Emergency cleanup and stale-rotation cleanup stay deferred until their dedicated confirmation workflow is implemented and validated.

agentIdentityRevoke.actionDescription: Revoke the current agent identity through the backend trust endpoint. This is not agent software removal.
agentIdentityRevoke.destructiveWarning: This is a destructive trust operation. Backend validation is authoritative and the current agent credentials stop authenticating after success.
agentIdentityRevoke.lifecycleDataStale: Lifecycle data does not belong to the selected node. Refresh before revocation.
agentIdentityRevoke.identityAlreadyRevokedState: Agent identity is already revoked. Refresh diagnostics to inspect recovery state.
agentIdentityRevoke.identityMissingState: No active agent identity is visible. Backend may still reject or confirm exact state after refresh.
agentIdentityRevoke.identityUnknownWarning: Current lifecycle status is incomplete; backend validation remains authoritative.
agentIdentityRevoke.confirmationHelp: Type {{value}} exactly. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed; case is not normalized.
agentIdentityRevoke.reasonHelp: Use a short audit-safe reason. Do not paste tokens, headers, keys, request bodies or secret references.
agentIdentityRevoke.acknowledgementLabel: I understand that identity revocation invalidates current agent credentials and does not reinstall, stop, reboot, clean or re-enroll the node.

does.rejectCurrentToken: Prevent the current agent token from authenticating.
does.revokeEnrollmentTokens: Revoke active unused enrollment tokens for this node.
does.requiresNewEnrollmentToken: Require explicit issuance of a new enrollment token before re-enrollment.
does.preserveQueuedJobs: Preserve queued jobs for later operator review.

doesNot.createReplacementToken: Automatically create a replacement enrollment token.

agentIdentityRevoke.reenrollmentGuidance: Issue a new enrollment token later through the explicit onboarding controls only after reviewing the node state.
agentIdentityRevoke.success: Agent identity revoked. The previous agent credentials can no longer authenticate.

errors.confirmationMismatch: Confirmation must match the selected node name exactly.
errors.confirmationMismatchBackend: Backend rejected the confirmation. Type the current node name again.
errors.confirmationUnsafe: Confirmation must be a single line without control characters.
errors.reasonTooShort: Reason must be at least 5 characters.
errors.reasonTooLong: Reason must be at most 500 characters.
errors.reasonUnsafe: Reason must not contain tokens, credentials, headers, secret references or request-body-like content.
errors.requestInvalid: Invalid revoke request. Review confirmation and reason.
errors.permissionRequired: node.bootstrap permission is required to revoke agent identity.
errors.nodeNotFound: Node no longer exists. Refresh node state.
errors.identityMissingBackend: Backend reports that the agent identity is missing.
errors.conflict: Agent identity cannot be revoked from the current backend state. Refresh lifecycle data before retrying.
errors.rateLimited: Agent identity revoke was rate limited. Wait before retrying manually.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Agent identity revoke is unavailable or failed server-side. State was not changed unless backend confirms otherwise.
errors.contractMismatch: Backend returned a result for a different node. Current UI state was not marked successful; refresh node data.
errors.generic: Agent identity revoke failed. Current UI state was not changed.

nodeReboot.actionDescription: Queue an asynchronous node.reboot job through the existing agent channel. This does not prove reboot execution or recovery.
nodeReboot.disruptionWarning: This is a disruptive operation. Queueing a reboot may interrupt traffic and administrative sessions handled by the node.
nodeReboot.unknownStateWarning: Current lifecycle state is incomplete; backend validation remains authoritative.

blocked.permissionRequired: node.bootstrap permission is required to queue a node reboot.
blocked.lifecycleDataStale: Lifecycle data does not belong to the selected node. Refresh before queueing a reboot.
blocked.terminalNode: This node is in a terminal or retired state. Reboot queueing is disabled.
blocked.identityMissing: No active agent identity is visible. Reboot queueing is disabled until identity state is recovered.
blocked.identityRevoked: Agent identity is revoked. Reboot queueing is disabled.
blocked.channelUnavailable: Agent communication is clearly unavailable. Reboot queueing is disabled until the channel recovers.

nodeReboot.confirmationHelp: Type {{value}} exactly. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed; case is not normalized.
nodeReboot.reasonHelp: Use a short audit-safe reason. Do not paste tokens, headers, keys, request bodies, command output or secret references.
nodeReboot.acknowledgementLabel: I understand that this queues a reboot job only and does not prove that the node rebooted, went offline, returned online or recovered services.

does.deliverViaAgent: Deliver the job through the existing agent channel.
does.interruptTraffic: May interrupt VPN and proxy traffic handled by this node.
does.temporaryUnavailable: May temporarily make the node unavailable.
does.delayQueuedWork: May delay queued work while the operating system restarts.
does.manualInvestigation: Require manual investigation if the node does not return.
does.retainHistory: Retain job history and audit evidence.

doesNot.proveExecution: Prove that the reboot command executed.
doesNot.proveShutdown: Prove that the node shut down or went offline.
doesNot.proveHeartbeatRecovery: Prove that a fresh heartbeat was received.

nodeReboot.queueOnlyDisclaimer: This confirms queueing only. It does not confirm that the node rebooted or returned online.

errors.confirmationMismatch: Confirmation must match the selected node name exactly.
errors.confirmationMismatchBackend: Backend rejected the confirmation. Type the current node name again.
errors.confirmationUnsafe: Confirmation must be a single line without control characters.
errors.reasonTooShort: Reason must be at least 5 characters.
errors.reasonTooLong: Reason must be at most 500 characters.
errors.reasonUnsafe: Reason must not contain tokens, credentials, headers, secret references, command output or request-body-like content.
errors.requestInvalid: Invalid reboot request. Review confirmation and reason.
errors.permissionRequired: node.bootstrap permission is required to queue node reboot.
errors.nodeNotFound: Node no longer exists. Refresh node state.
errors.agentMissing: Backend reports that the active agent identity is missing.
errors.agentUnavailable: Backend reports that the agent channel is unavailable for reboot queueing.
errors.conflict: Another active node operation prevents reboot queueing. Review Jobs and retry explicitly after the conflict is resolved.
errors.rateLimited: Node reboot queueing was rate limited. Wait before retrying manually.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Node reboot queueing is unavailable or failed server-side. No successful queueing may be assumed.
errors.contractMismatch: Backend returned an unexpected reboot job response. Current UI state was not marked successful; refresh node data.
errors.generic: Node reboot queueing failed. Current UI state was not changed.

lifecycleControls.staleRotationBody: Read-only backend preview of stale agent-token rotation candidates. It never includes job payloads, job results or secret material.
lifecycleControls.noCandidatesBody: The backend did not report stale rotation candidates for this node.

reasons.claimedWithoutResultAndAgentInactive: Claimed rotation without result while agent is inactive.
reasons.agentProgressAfterCreation: Agent progress was observed after rotation creation.
reasons.agentProgressAfterClaim: Agent progress was observed after rotation claim.
reasons.claimOrLeaseStillActive: Claim or lease is still active.
reasons.supersededByNewerRotation: A newer rotation superseded this candidate.
reasons.unknown: Backend returned an unrecognized stale-rotation reason.

errors.notFound: The node or stale-rotation preview was not found.
errors.conflict: The stale-rotation preview conflicts with current lifecycle state. Refresh node data.
errors.validation: The backend rejected the stale-rotation preview request.
errors.generic: The stale-rotation preview is unavailable. Check permissions, connectivity and backend logs.

nodes.tokenCreated: Backend created an enrollment token. Copy it now; plaintext is not returned again.
nodes.tokenRotated: Backend rotated the enrollment token. Copy it now; plaintext is not returned again.
nodes.sshAccessMethodCreated: Backend created the SSH access method. Connectivity is not implied until bootstrap or terminal checks run.
nodes.bootstrapQueued: Backend queued the node bootstrap workflow.
nodes.sshSessionCreated: Backend created a short-lived SSH terminal session.
nodes.noJob: No node job is currently selected.
nodes.reconcileRuntimeImpact: Runtime reconcile can queue inventory, discovery and dependent runtime reconciliation jobs as defined by the backend.

instances.title: Service instances
instances.subtitle: Runtime objects deployed on managed nodes. Client access groups are managed under Clients -> Groups.
instances.accessGroupsReadOnly: Access groups are shown as runtime materialization context only.
instances.searchPlaceholder: Instance name, service, node, status or ID
instances.accessGroupsReadonlyNote: Instances show materialized access groups for runtime inspection only. Add, move and remove clients under Clients -> Groups.
instances.noJob: No instance job is currently selected.
instances.confirmImpact: {{operation}} affects instance {{instance}} on node {{node}} for service {{service}}. Current status: {{status}}.
instances.rollbackRevision: Rollback target revision: {{revision}}. If backend marks it apply-ready, the UI will queue a real apply job.
instances.replaceSpecImpact: Backend will create a new validated revision. Apply after save: {{apply}}.
instances.applyAfterSpecSave: Apply after saving spec when backend marks the revision apply-ready
instances.specMustBeObject: Spec JSON must be an object.
instances.manualCreateBackendValidated: Manual create is submitted directly to backend validation; no separate preview endpoint exists in this release.

servicePacks.subtitle: Backend service pack catalog, instance creation and pack lifecycle controls.
servicePacks.jsonEditorNote: The backend owns service pack validation and rejects unsupported definitions.
servicePacks.deleted: Backend marked the service pack deleted.
servicePacks.createInstanceAccepted: Backend accepted service pack instance creation.
servicePacks.noSeparateValidation: No separate validation endpoint; create is backend-validated on submit.

runtimeArtifacts.subtitle: Runtime binary repository artifacts used by service drivers and node installers.
runtimeArtifacts.urlImportOnly: This UI uses the backend HTTPS URL import endpoint; local file upload remains available only through API tooling.
runtimeArtifacts.deleteUnsupported: Backend has no binary runtime artifact delete endpoint in this release.

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Client identities, access bindings, generated delivery artifacts and subscriptions.
clients.groupsSubtitle: Source of truth for VLESS and future grouped access materialization.
clients.selectionInvalidatesPreview: Changing selection invalidates the previous preview.
clients.bulkBounded: Bulk operations are bounded by affected instances, not one apply job per client.

core.workspaceSubtitle: Operator workspace for client identities, VLESS access assignment, artifacts and client-scoped jobs.
core.searchPlaceholder: Username, email, display name or ID
core.noGenericEditEndpoint: Client metadata updates use the backend PATCH endpoint.
core.noDisableEndpoint: Backend has no client disable endpoint in this release.
core.downloadStarted: Download opened through the backend artifact endpoint.

routes.createRequiresAccess: Route creation requires an active service access target in the current backend.
routes.editImpact: Update route {{route}} for {{client}}. The backend validates the route and queues route policy convergence where applicable.
routes.deleteImpact: The backend revokes this route and queues route policy convergence where applicable.
routes.updateUnavailable: Client route update uses the backend PATCH endpoint.

maintenance.revokeUnavailable: Per-access revoke uses the backend revoke endpoint.
maintenance.previewUnavailable: Backend has no preview endpoint for access rotation/delete/config cleanup; confirmation is required and the backend performs validation.
maintenance.configCleanupImpact: Deletes generated artifacts, share links, subscriptions and managed files for this client where backend storage supports cleanup.
maintenance.rotateImpact: Rotate access {{access}} with {{driver}}. Existing configs may stop working until the returned job applies and new artifacts are delivered.
maintenance.revokeImpact: Revoke service access {{access}}. Related access routes and active share links for that access are revoked and convergence jobs may be queued.
maintenance.deleteImpact: Delete service access {{access}}. Related generated configs, routes and secret references are removed and convergence jobs may be queued.
maintenance.cleanupConfirmImpact: Cleanup generated configs for {{client}}. Existing downloads, share links and subscriptions for this client will be removed.

delivery.historyUnavailable: Delivery history is loaded from the backend history endpoint.
delivery.vlessOnly: Only VLESS subscriptions are supported by the current backend endpoint.
delivery.subject: Subject
delivery.createShareForEmail: Create a share link for email delivery if needed
delivery.emailBackendScope: The current backend sends the client's available artifacts; artifact-specific email selection is not exposed by the endpoint.
delivery.shareCreated: Share link created. Copy the one-time URL now.
delivery.shareRotated: Share link rotated. Copy the new one-time URL now.
delivery.subscriptionCreated: VLESS subscription URL created. Copy it now.
delivery.subscriptionRotated: VLESS subscription URL rotated. Copy the new URL now.
delivery.oneTimeWarning: This value may be shown only once. Copy it now and store it securely.
delivery.confirmImpact: {{operation}} {{objectType}} {{object}} for {{client}}. Existing clients may lose access when the current token is revoked or rotated.

groups.materializedSummary: Materialized: {{created}} created, {{updated}} updated, {{disabled}} disabled across {{instances}} affected instances.
groups.pastedRefs: Pasted usernames, emails or client IDs
groups.syncPreviewSummary: {{instances}} affected instances, {{members}} active members, {{pending}} pending, {{applied}} applied, {{failed}} failed.

firewall.title: Firewall
firewall.subtitle: Address groups -> rules -> policy -> preview -> apply -> node state.
firewall.previewMandatory: Preview is mandatory before strict apply.

traffic.title: Traffic accounting
traffic.subtitle: Overview, client usage, collectors, samples and no-store export.
traffic.noStoreExport: Export is requested directly from the backend and must not be cached.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.subtitle: Active work, history, failures and backend execution logs.
jobs.cancelConfirmBody: Cancel job {{id}} ({{type}}). The backend will reject cancellation if the job is already terminal or cannot be interrupted safely.
jobs.cancelUnavailable: Only queued, pending, retrying or running jobs can be cancelled.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.subtitle: Runtime preflight, TLS, auth, mail, security and local browser settings.
settings.applyTlsConfirmBody: Apply the saved TLS settings to the running control plane. This is a production-impacting action and may restart the TLS edge.
settings.inviteRevokeUnsupported: Invite revoke is disabled because the backend has no invite revoke endpoint in this release.
settings.revokeSessionConfirmBody: Revoke session {{id}} for {{user}}. The browser session will be invalidated immediately.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.subtitle: TLS certificates, managed authorities and service PKI roots.
certificates.noAuthorities: No active CA certificate is available. Create a managed CA first.

default.title: Set default certificate
default.body: Set {{name}} as the default platform TLS certificate.

revoke.title: Revoke certificate
revoke.body: Revoke {{name}}. The certificate cannot be used by runtime resolution after revocation.

delete.title: Delete CA certificate
delete.cascade: Backend deletes the selected CA certificate tree as a cascade.

routePolicy.subtitle: Node route policy preview, apply and cleanup backed by backend route safety validation.
routePolicy.selectNode: Select a node route policy to preview or apply.
routePolicy.previewStaleBlocksApply: Apply is disabled until a fresh preview is generated for the selected node.
routePolicy.confirmApplyBody: Apply generated route policy to {{node}}. This queues backend node.route_policy.apply and may change routing on the target node.
routePolicy.confirmCleanupBody: Cleanup managed route policy state on {{node}}. This queues backend node.route_policy.cleanup.
routePolicy.jobImpact: Backend queues a signed node job and the operator should track it on the Jobs page.

backhaul.title: Backhaul
backhaul.subtitle: Ingress-to-egress links, standby transports, route projection and repair actions.
backhaul.secretSafetyBody: Transport config payloads and secret refs are intentionally not rendered in this console view.
backhaul.actionQueued: Backend accepted the action and returned {{count}} job(s).
backhaul.jobImpact: Backend queues signed node jobs; track completion before assuming routing changed.

confirm.title: Confirm {{operation}}
confirm.apply: Apply managed backhaul profiles for {{link}} on ingress and egress nodes.
confirm.probe: Run backend backhaul probe jobs for {{link}}.
confirm.promote: Promote transport {{transport}} on {{link}} and refresh route/Xray convergence as required.

artifacts.title: Artifacts / Delivery
artifacts.subtitle: Generated client configurations, downloads, public share links and delivery state.

errors.forbidden: The current operator does not have permission for this action.
errors.conflict: The backend reported a conflict. Refresh the page and review the current state.
errors.validation: The backend rejected the request. Review highlighted fields.
errors.server: The backend returned an internal error.
